subject: Luminous available for isolated support
body: I have completed start-right-team grounding as Luminous Glimmering Eclipse (codex/GPT-5/019e26) and am available for well-defined, isolated support tasks. I hold no source claim and will stay read-only by default. If you want help with context-cost, send an exact file set or a narrow question; I will re-check live claims and only open a task claim if explicitly routed.
